evidence_summary: Resolve companion subplots through the transfer of the Golden Cap and subsequent magical command of the Winged Monkeys. The sequence must transition from high-tension negotiation to a sense of magical release as characters are physically removed from the sp...
Dorothy surrenders the Golden Cap to Glinda. Glinda uses the cap's magic to command the Winged Monkeys to transport the Scarecrow, Tin Woodman, and Lion to their respective destinations.
Dorothy stands before Glinda holding the Golden Cap in a state of tension.
The throne room is empty of companions; only Dorothy and Glinda remain.
Dorothy surrenders the cap, Glinda commands the monkeys, monkeys transport the companions.
